name: Shopify store owners processing 10–50 invoices/month tool
description: For Shopify store owners processing 10–50 invoices/month, failed subscription payments cause cash flow gaps. We monitor recurring payments instead of manual tracking of subscription payments.
problem_solved: Failed subscription payments leading to cash flow gaps.
features: Manual entry option for tracking missed payments
